name: read_device_variable
description: Read the current value of a variable exposed by device firmware. Variables can be integers, doubles, or strings representing sensor readings, device state, or any data the firmware publishes. Use get_device_info first to see available variables.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the device.

parameters.name: varName
parameters.description: The name of the variable to read, as exposed by the device firmware.
